question: Write a method to check if a number is prime
model_answer: static boolean isPrime(int n){ if(n<2) return false; for(int i=2;i*i<=n;i++){ if(n%i==0) return false;} return true; }
student_answer: static boolean isPrime(int n){ for(int i=2;i<n;i++){ if(n%i==0) return false;} return true; }
